violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. Plastic tray on the bread rack in the walk-in cooler is cracked and broken.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the microwave next to the bread toaster needs to be cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Cabinet doors by the pop machine are sticky and need to be cleaned. Shelving in the back prep area holding sheet trays need to be cleaned.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Box of single-use gloves were being stored on the floor in the dry storage.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors in the dry storage, walk-in cooler, and freezer need to be cleaned.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. Employees coat was being stored on the rack above utensils and sauce containers.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
